message:
chore: add missing ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Prevent accidentally committing build artifacts, agent progress
files, and other ephemeral files that were found untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,6 +56,9 @@ target-codex*/
 # Compiler crash reports
 rustc-ice-*.txt
 
+# Destructive Command Guard local state
+.dcg/
+
 # Agent coordination config
 .agent-mail.yaml
